args: const input = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0, 'utf-8')); const tool = input.tool?.name || ''; if (tool === 'run_in_terminal' && input.tool?.arguments?.command?.match(/git\s+(commit|push)/)) { console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage: '⚠️  Remember to export Drupal config (drush cex) before committing. Run .github/hooks/pre-commit-config-check.sh to validate.'})); } else { console.log('{}'); }
